name: Greenmail Excise Tax Avoidance

eligibility.description: The 50% tax is avoided if the shareholder holds the stock for 2+ years, does not make/threaten a public tender offer, or if the corporation's buyback offer is extended to all shareholders on equal terms.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Avoid a 50% excise tax on stock buyback gains by ensuring the acquisition offer is made on the same terms to all shareholders or by holding stock for at least 2 years.
